message:
fix(raptorq): start repair ESI cursor at K' instead of K in SystematicEncoder

The next_repair_esi field was initialized to K (source symbol count)
but repair symbols should start at K' (the smallest K' >= K from the
systematic index table).  ESIs in the range [K, K') are virtual padding
symbols and must not be used as repair symbol identifiers.

Extracts k_prime from params before the struct literal to avoid
borrow-after-move.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
